ticket.subject: Line items missing
ticket.description:
Hi Team,
Hope you’re doing well.
We’ve been using the PHMCSL app for a few years now, and recently we’ve started encountering issues with shipping rates not being generated. Upon checking, we noticed that the backend product export is missing several product variants.
For example, for our Besta Top (one side):
https://admin.shopify.com/store/fronteriors-us/products/8259420750098
This product has multiple size and color variants. However, when we export the backend products CSV to review packaging sizes, many of these variants are missing.
Could you please confirm if there are any limitations on the number of product variants?
For reference, here is an example of a SKU that is missing from the backend packaging export CSV:
BES.TOP.PNT.BUR.BAS.000.1819x418.N
We’ve ensured that all relevant settings are correctly enabled (e.g., marked as physical products, stock quantities added, etc.).
We’d really appreciate your help in identifying and resolving this issue.
Thank you,

[Fronteriors Nov25.png]


NEELIMA SALA

Designer & Project manager

Europe & Middle East<https://fronteriors.co/> | USA<https://us.fronteriors.co/>

@fronteriors<https://www.instagram.com/fronteriors/>

comments.body:
Need assistance from L3 team:

Case: Product variants are missing and some products are duplicated on the App → Products page.

Details:
A customer on the $9 Starter plan (MCSL) reported that shipping rates are failing. Upon checking, they noticed that some product variants are missing in the app, which is affecting the rate calculation.

For example, the product "BASIC TOP FOR BESTA (FOR 1 SIDE)" has 103 variants in Shopify, but only 101 variants are available in the app. The customer reported that the following variants are missing:

- “71 5/8 x 16 1/2 (for 1 side) / Burgundy / No”
- “71 5/8 x 16 1/2 (for 1 side) / Burgundy / Yes”

Could you please help force import all products/variants from Shopify? We attempted the Force Import option, but the missing variants were still not synced.

Additionally, while checking, we noticed that some products appear duplicated in the app. For example, the product “ANTIQUE BRASS KNOB” appears three times in the app, while it exists only once in Shopify.

For reference, I have attached screenshots and the product export CSV file

Could you please help remove the duplicate entries as well?

Store Details:
Store URL – fronteriors-us.myshopify.com
Account ID – 982c66be-f6ca-4390-a44a-c5a39f0ca463
Active From – 2023-04-19

comments.body:
Hi Manohar,

Thanks for the update — we’ll wait to hear back from you.

We don’t make frequent changes to our products, but we do add new products from time to time. Recently, we’ve also introduced a few additional size variants to some existing items.

We really appreciate your quick response, especially given the current shipping discrepancies. These are causing checkout issues, and clients have started reaching out to us about it.

If a call would be easier, I’d be happy to walk you through the core issue — just let me know what works for you.

Thank you,

![Fronteriors Nov25.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/FON64FKELnCxzUsNoNqWgRhwM/?name=Fronteriors+Nov25.png)

**NEELIMA SALA**

Designer & Project manager

Europe & Middle East | USA

@fronteriors

comments.body:
Hello Neelima,

Thank you for your patience!

Our team is working on this case and for now, for the products with 100 variants, there will be some discrepancies.

We request you to do a force import all from time to time as a workaround.

We will be releasing the fix asap.

Regards,

Sibi Firoz
Team PluginHive

Hi Sibi, team,

It looks like the force import has resolved the issue—we’re now able to see all variants correctly in the backend export for packaging.

Could we please have the same “force import” option enabled on our other store as well? We’re managing two stores for different locations and are facing a similar issue there due to the number of variants.

Store: fronteriors-online.myshopify.com

Please let us know if this can be arranged.

Thank you,
